creator: redlance@primenet.com
text:
Well running a make install of /usr/ports/security/ssh I get the following output:
===>   Generating temporary packing list
Installing /usr/local/etc/rc.d/sshd.sh startup file.
sed: 751: No such file or directory
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/security/ssh.
*** Error code 1

I last updated my ports tree on 04-09-00

How-To-Repeat: run make install on ssh port
